script: |
  $projectPath = Join-Path "$(Build.SourcesDirectory)" "src\WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.IntServices\WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.AzureFunctions\WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.AzureFunctions.csproj"

  Write-Host "Publishing project:"
  Write-Host $projectPath
  Write-Host "Project exists:"
  Write-Host (Test-Path $projectPath)

  dotnet publish $projectPath `
    --configuration ${{ parameters.buildConfiguration }} `
    --framework net8.0 `
    --output "$(Build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)"
